request_text: Fix the SonarCloud scanner configuration so coverage attribution resolves correctly for the multi-package src layout (src/specify_cli + src/mission_runtime + src/runtime): the scanner logs 'Cannot resolve the file path __init__.py of the coverage report, ambiguity, the file exists in several source' and drops coverage for 5+ files, distorting the new_coverage quality gate

evidence_ref: Root mechanism: per-package --cov produces multiple <source> + bare filenames; Sonar ambiguity drops coverage. Fix 81535b16e: [tool.coverage.run] relative_files + CI normalization step rewriting <sources> to single src root with package-prefixed filenames (734 prefixed in sample, zero dupes). Final proof = next CI run sonar log
